Package com.tonic.jaloc.impl.fixedqueues

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    PBoolFixedQueue
    A fixed-capacity native bool FIFO queue that rejects when full.
    PByteFixedQueue
    A fixed-capacity native byte FIFO queue that rejects when full.
    PCharFixedQueue
    A fixed-capacity native char FIFO queue that rejects when full.
    PDoubleFixedQueue
    A fixed-capacity native double FIFO queue that rejects when full.
    PFloatFixedQueue
    A fixed-capacity native float FIFO queue that rejects when full.
    PIntFixedQueue
    A fixed-capacity native int FIFO queue that rejects when full.
    PLongFixedQueue
    A fixed-capacity native long FIFO queue that rejects when full.
    PShortFixedQueue
    A fixed-capacity native short FIFO queue that rejects when full.
    PStructFixedQueue<T extends PStruct>
    A fixed-capacity native struct FIFO queue that rejects when full.
